DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF ROYAL CHAIN, INC.'S MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION, SET ONE, AND FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $565.00, GRANTED IN PART, DENIED IN PART: A. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Admitted Pltf'S Request For Admissions, Set One, And For Sanctions In The Amount Of $565.00
Off Calendar Jul-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
William F. Abbott, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Royal Chain, Inc

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Royal Chain, Inc.'s Motion to deem admitted plaintiff's requests for admission, set one, and for sanctions in the amount of $565.00, granted in part, denied in part:
a. Request for admissions nos. 1 through 6, inclusive, are deemed admitted;
b. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-19-2009 Assigned To Arbitration On Jul-27-09
